title: Radha Raman Temple
tagline: Radha Raman Temple — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Sri Radha Raman Temple, is a Hindu temple situated in Vrindavan, India.
overview.description: Sri Radha Raman Temple, is a Hindu temple situated in Vrindavan, India. It is dedicated to Krishna who is worshiped as Radha Ramana. This temple is counted as one of the Seven most revered ancient temples of Vrindavan along with Radha Vallabh Temple, Radha Damodar Temple, Radha Madanmohan Temple, Radha Govindji Temple, Radha Shyamsundar Temple and Radha Gokulnandan Temple. The temple houses the original Shaligram deity of Krishna alongside goddess Radha.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Darul Uloom Deoband
topPlaces.description: Darul Uloom Deoband is an Islamic seminary in Deoband, Uttar Pradesh, India, established on 15 Muharram 1283 AH / 31 May 1866, in the aftermath of the 1857 revolt, through the efforts of Sayyid Muhammad Abid and other local scholars and notables. Muhammad Qasim Nanautawi is later described in historiography as the seminary’s intellectual guide and principal founder (bānī-yi aʿẓam).

topPlaces.name: Deoband
topPlaces.description: Deoband is a town and a municipality in Saharanpur district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India, about 150 km (93 miles) from Delhi. Darul Uloom Deoband, an Islamic seminary and one of the largest Islamic institutions of India is located there.

topPlaces.name: Centenary Celebration of Darul Uloom Deoband
topPlaces.description: Darul Uloom Deoband is a Madrasa located in Saharanpur district of Uttar Pradesh, India, established on 30 May 1866. Its centennial conference was held on 21, 22 and 23 March 1980.

image.alt: Centenary Celebration of Darul Uloom Deoband

topPlaces.name: Masjid-e-Rasheed
topPlaces.description: The Masjid-e-Rasheed, also known as the Jame Rashid Mosque, and the Masjid-e-Rashidiyah, and the Taj Masjid, also sometimes spelled as the Masjid Jam-e-Rashid, is a Sunni Hanafi Friday mosque, located in the compound of Darul Uloom Deoband in Deoband, in the Saharanpur district of the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. This mosque is named after Rasheed Ahmad Gangohi, the second patron of Darul Uloom Deoband.

topPlaces.name: Darul Uloom Waqf Deoband
topPlaces.description: Al-Jamia Al-Islamia Darul Uloom Waqf Deoband (known as Darul Uloom Waqf) is a madrasa situated in the Indian town of Deoband. It was established by scholars led by Muhammad Salim Qasmi and Anzar Shah Kashmiri in 1982 as a result of administration disputes in Darul Uloom Deoband during 1980–1982.

topPlaces.name: Manki, Uttar Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Manki is a village situated in the Deoband Mandal of Saharanpur District in the state of Uttar Pradesh. The village is 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) from its Mandal headquarters at Deoband.

topPlaces.name: Miragpur
topPlaces.description: Miragpur is a village situated in the Deoband Mandal of Saharanpur District in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. The name of Miragpur, which has gained recognition across the country for being a drug-free village, has been added in the Asia Book of Records.

topPlaces.name: Kuri, Varanasi
topPlaces.description: Kuri is a village in Pindra tehsil, Varanasi district, Uttar Pradesh, India.

items.note: Darul Uloom Deoband is an Islamic seminary in Deoband, Uttar Pradesh, India, established on 15 Muharram 1283 AH / 31 May 1866, in the aftermath of the 1857 revolt, through the efforts of Sayyid Muhammad Abid and other local scholars and notables. Muhammad Qasim Nanautawi is later described in historiography as the seminary’s intellectual guide and principal founder (bānī-yi aʿẓam).

Deoband is a town and a municipality in Saharanpur district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India, about 150 km (93 miles) from Delhi. Darul Uloom Deoband, an Islamic seminary and one of the largest Islamic institutions of India is located there.

items.activity: Centenary Celebration of Darul Uloom Deoband
items.note: Darul Uloom Deoband is a Madrasa located in Saharanpur district of Uttar Pradesh, India, established on 30 May 1866. Its centennial conference was held on 21, 22 and 23 March 1980.

The Masjid-e-Rasheed, also known as the Jame Rashid Mosque, and the Masjid-e-Rashidiyah, and the Taj Masjid, also sometimes spelled as the Masjid Jam-e-Rashid, is a Sunni Hanafi Friday mosque, located in the compound of Darul Uloom Deoband in Deoband, in the Saharanpur district of the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. This mosque is named after Rasheed Ahmad Gangohi, the second patron of Darul Uloom Deoband.

Al-Jamia Al-Islamia Darul Uloom Waqf Deoband (known as Darul Uloom Waqf) is a madrasa situated in the Indian town of Deoband. It was established by scholars led by Muhammad Salim Qasmi and Anzar Shah Kashmiri in 1982 as a result of administration disputes in Darul Uloom Deoband during 1980–1982.
Manki is a village situated in the Deoband Mandal of Saharanpur District in the state of Uttar Pradesh. The village is 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) from its Mandal headquarters at Deoband.

Miragpur is a village situated in the Deoband Mandal of Saharanpur District in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. The name of Miragpur, which has gained recognition across the country for being a drug-free village, has been added in the Asia Book of Records.
Kuri is a village in Pindra tehsil, Varanasi district, Uttar Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Radha Raman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Radha Raman Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Radha Raman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dehradun Airport (Jolly Grant) (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Haridwar Junction (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Radha Raman Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Radha Raman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Radha Raman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Radha Raman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Radha Raman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Darul Uloom Deoband, Deoband, Centenary Celebration of Darul Uloom Deoband, Masjid-e-Rasheed, Darul Uloom Waqf Deoband.
